services.name: pub.globalVariable:getGlobalVariable
services.description: WmPublic. Returns a global variable value.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String. Name of a global variable. For more information about global variables, see IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

input_parameters.name: defaultValue
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. The default value that Integration Server must return in the absence of a global variable.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: String. Returns the global variable value.

output_parameters.name: isSecure
output_parameters.description: String. Indicates whether the global variable is a password or not.
